title: Jeffers Pet Stainless Steel Pet Food & Water Bowl – Embossed Paw Print, Wide Lip, Non Slip, Dishwasher Safe, Rust Resistant Metal Dog Cat Feeding Dish for Indoor Outdoor Crate Travel Use, 3 Quart
features: Durable Stainless Steel Construction - Crafted from rust resistant stainless steel for long-lasting use; ideal for dogs, cats, puppies, kittens, rabbits, ferrets, and other pets indoors or outdoors.
Embossed Paw Print Design - Features a decorative embossed paw print for a stylish look; fits in modern homes, pet kitchens, crates, kennels, or travel feeding stations.
Wide Lip for Easy Handling - Wide lip rim provides better grip for lifting, carrying, and placement; perfect for use on floors, mats, stands, or in elevated pet feeders.
Easy to Clean & Odor Resistant - Dishwasher safe and odor resistant for simple maintenance; helps reduce mess and is compatible with food, water, wet meals, kibble, or raw diets.
Versatile Use & Travel Friendly - Great for feeding at home, during travel, at pet daycares, camping, or vet visits; fits most feeding platforms, slow feeders, and spill resistant trays.
description: Elevate mealtime with the Jeffers Pet Stainless Steel Embossed Wide Lip Food & Water Bowls. perfect for dogs, cats, puppies, and small animals. These stylish, pet safe bowls feature an embossed paw design and a wide lip for easy grip and handling. Crafted from durable, rust resistant stainless steel, they’re odor-resistant, dishwasher safe, and built to last through daily use indoors or outdoors. Ideal for dry kibble, wet food, water, or even raw diets. Their sleek, non-toxic metal construction helps keep food and water fresh and hygienic. Use at home, in kennels, or while traveling great for crates, stands, and elevated feeders. Designed for easy cleaning, spill resistance, and minimal mess. Whether you're feeding dogs, cats, these versatile bowls are a must have for every pet parent. Compatible with slow feeder inserts or travel bowls. Say goodbye to plastic stains or odors choose the long lasting, easy to maintain stainless steel solution trusted by pet lovers. Available in multiple sizes: 16 oz, 1 quart, 2 quart, 3 quart and 5 quart
